scripts.build: bun run typecheck && bunx vite build
scripts.test: bun run typecheck && bun test src --isolate
scripts.e2e:smoke: bun run e2e:gen && bun run e2e:teacher:smoke:run && bun run e2e:assistant:smoke:run && bun run e2e:admin:smoke:run && bun run e2e:shiyan:smoke:run
scripts.e2e:teacher:smoke: bun run e2e:gen && bun run e2e:teacher:smoke:run
scripts.e2e:teacher: bun run e2e:gen && bunx playwright test --config=playwright.teacher.config.ts
scripts.e2e:teacher:headed: bun run e2e:gen && bunx playwright test --config=playwright.teacher.config.ts --headed
scripts.e2e:auth: bun run e2e:gen && E2E_BACKEND_PORT=54127 bunx playwright test --config=playwright.auth.config.ts
scripts.e2e:quiz: bun run e2e:gen && E2E_BACKEND_PORT=54126 E2E_FRONTEND_PORT=55126 bunx playwright test --config=playwright.quiz.config.ts
scripts.e2e:quiz:headed: bun run e2e:gen && E2E_BACKEND_PORT=54126 E2E_FRONTEND_PORT=55126 bunx playwright test --config=playwright.quiz.config.ts --headed
scripts.e2e:assistant:smoke: bun run e2e:gen && bun run e2e:assistant:smoke:run
scripts.e2e:assistant: bun run e2e:gen && bunx playwright test --config=playwright.assistant.config.ts
scripts.e2e:assistant:headed: bun run e2e:gen && bunx playwright test --config=playwright.assistant.config.ts --headed
scripts.e2e:admin:smoke: bun run e2e:gen && bun run e2e:admin:smoke:run
scripts.e2e:admin: bun run e2e:gen && bunx playwright test --config=playwright.admin.config.ts
scripts.e2e:admin:headed: bun run e2e:gen && bunx playwright test --config=playwright.admin.config.ts --headed
scripts.e2e:shiyan:smoke: bun run e2e:gen && bun run e2e:shiyan:smoke:run
scripts.e2e:shiyan: bun run e2e:gen && bunx playwright test --config=playwright.shiyan.config.ts
scripts.e2e:shiyan:headed: bun run e2e:gen && bunx playwright test --config=playwright.shiyan.config.ts --headed
scripts.e2e:shiyan:concurrency:server: AUTH_LOGIN_RATE_LIMIT_MAX_PER_IP=1000 E2E_CONCURRENCY_MODEL_JOBS=50 E2E_CONCURRENCY_MODEL_CAPACITY_REQUESTS=100 E2E_CONCURRENCY_MODEL_CAPACITY_HOLD_MS=3000 E2E_CONCURRENCY_PDF_JOBS=12 E2E_CONCURRENCY_PDF_STUDENTS=50 E2E_CONCURRENCY_PDF_QUEUE_TIMEOUT_MS=60000 E2E_CONCURRENCY_EXPECT_PDF_503=0 DB_CONNECTION_LIMIT=140 bun run scripts/shiyan-concurrency-suite.ts all
scripts.e2e:session: bun run e2e:gen && bunx playwright test --config=playwright.session.config.ts
scripts.e2e:session:headed: bun run e2e:gen && bunx playwright test --config=playwright.session.config.ts --headed
scripts.e2e:all: bun run e2e:gen && bunx playwright test --config=playwright.auth.config.ts && bunx playwright test --config=playwright.runtime-cleanup.config.ts && bunx playwright test --config=playwright.teacher.config.ts && bunx playwright test --config=playwright.assistant.config.ts && bunx playwright test --config=playwright.admin.config.ts && bunx playwright test --config=playwright.shiyan.config.ts && bunx playwright test --config=playwright.session.config.ts
